name: xurgo-atlas
description: Xurgo Atlas: safe, versioned, auditable documentation management for AI-assisted software projects

scripts.test:fast: vitest run tests/package-bin-alias.test.ts tests/mcp-metadata.test.ts tests/docs-search.test.ts tests/cli-usage.test.ts tests/registry.test.ts tests/storage-migration.test.ts tests/private-rc-artifact.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/project.test.ts tests/daemon.test.ts tests/daemon-lifecycle.test.ts tests/http-server.test.ts
scripts.validate:quick: npm run test:fast && npm run build
scripts.validate:full: npm run build && npm test && npm_config_cache=/tmp/xurgo-atlas-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if(process.env.npm_command==='publish'&&!process.env.XURGO_ATLAS_PUBLISH){console.error('PUBLISH BLOCKED: set XURGO_ATLAS_PUBLISH=1 to publish');process.exit(1)}" && npm run build
